text: Dreams of finding lost treasure almost came true recently.
zh: 不久前,寻找失落宝藏的梦想差点成真。

text: A new machine called 'The Revealer' has been invented
zh: 一台名为'探测者'的新机器被发明出来,

text: and it has been used to detect gold which has been buried in the ground.
zh: 它被用来探测埋藏在地下的黄金。

text: The machine was used in a cave near the seashore where--it is said--pirates used to hide gold.
zh: 这台机器被用在海边一个山洞里——据说海盗曾在那里藏金。

text: The pirates would often bury gold in the cave and then fail to collect it.
zh: 海盗们常把金子埋在洞里,后来却没能取走。

text: Armed with the new machine, a search party went into the cave hoping to find buried treasure.
zh: 装备了这台新机器,一支搜寻队进入山洞,希望能找到埋藏的宝藏。

text: The leader of the party was examining the soil near the entrance to the cave when the machine showed that there was gold under the ground.
zh: 队长正在检查洞口附近的泥土时,机器显示地下有黄金。

text: Very excited, the party dug a hole two feet deep.
zh: 大家兴奋不已,挖了一个两英尺深的坑。

text: They finally found a small gold coin which was almost worthless.
zh: 他们最终找到一枚几乎一文不值的小金币。

text: The party then searched the whole cave thoroughly but did not find anything except an empty tin trunk.
zh: 随后,搜寻队仔细搜遍了整个山洞,却什么也没找到,只发现一个空铁箱。

text: In spite of this, many people are confident that 'The Revealer' may reveal something of value fairly soon.
zh: 尽管如此,许多人仍然相信,'探测者'很快就会发现一些真正有价值的东西。
